title: AI Trading
author: StockMaster-AI
selftext:
Hey everyone

I’ve been trading for a few years and recently started using AI tools to help with trades. It’s surprising how accurate AI signals can be. I’ve been using daytradesignals.ai for over a month now and their signals have been pretty on point. They also have monthly and weekly predictions which make it easier to see potential market moves ahead.

How do you all feel about using AI for trading? Do you trust the signals or prefer doing your own analysis? I’m curious to hear what others think and what tools you might be using.
